snapshots.sections_text:
PART: Recipes
NAME: Recipes
STATUS: draft

DATA: Recipe Book
MARKER: recipe_book
INTENT: holds all recipes and their details
TAGS: #time
---
The app holds a collection of recipes. Each recipe has a title, ingredients, instructions, cooking time, a rating, and a total time (preparation + baking).

STRUCTURE: Recipe List Screen
MARKER: recipe_list_screen
INTENT: the main screen showing all recipes including trending ones
TAGS: #list, #search
---
The screen has a header with the app name, a scrollable list of recipe cards, a search bar at the top, and a section for trending recipes below the main list.

WHEN: Search Recipe
MARKER: search_recipe
INTENT: user searches for a recipe by title
TAGS: #list, #search, #user, #when
---
When the user types in the search bar, the list of recipes filters to show only those with titles containing the search term. The user sees a list of matching recipes.

ASSERT: Recipe Ratings
MARKER: recipe_ratings
INTENT: ensure ratings are valid
LOCK: approved
TAGS: #assert
---
A recipe's rating must be between 1 and 5 stars.

SURFACE: Recipe Card
MARKER: recipe_card
INTENT: labels and text on recipe cards
TAGS: #card, #state, #surface
---
The recipe card displays the recipe title, a star rating, and a "View" button. The empty state reads "No recipes found."

DATA: Trending Recipes
MARKER: trending_recipes
INTENT: holds a list of trending recipes
TAGS: #date, #list
---
The app holds a list of trending recipes. Each recipe has a title, a short description, a rating, and a creation date.

STRUCTURE: Recipe View Screen
MARKER: recipe_view_screen
INTENT: the screen to display a selected recipe in a news article format
TAGS: #time
---
The screen displays the selected recipe in a detailed format, including ingredients, instructions, and a cooking time. The screen has a header with the recipe title, a body with the recipe content, and a footer with a back button.
